extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value (around 0.2–0.3), then clearly decreases to a low point near 0 by about one-quarter of the length.
R2: After this low point, the series rises steadily to a single broad main peak around three-quarters of the length, reaching a high value (about 0.7–1.0).
R3: From that main peak, the series decreases smoothly and monotonically towards the end, without creating another peak of comparable height.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a very low value (near 0), staying flat or nearly flat for the first quarter of the length.
R2: It then rises sharply from the low flat region to a main peak around the middle of the series (about halfway), reaching a high value (about 0.6–0.8).
R3: After the main peak, the series shows a secondary shoulder or bump (a smaller local peak) before descending towards the end, so the post-peak shape is more irregular than in Class 0.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts around 0.2–0.3 and decreases slightly during the first third of the time.
R2: It then rises steadily from a low close to 0 to a first main peak around time 12–14, reaching about 0.5–0.8.
R3: After that peak it stays relatively high with small fluctuations and then decreases moderately toward the end, but typically remains above 0.2 for most of the last third.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts near 0 and stays very close to 0 during the first third of the time.
R2: It then rises very sharply from near 0 to a main peak around time 12–14, reaching about 0.6–0.8.
R3: After that peak it declines rapidly and approximately monotonically so that values in the last quarter fall back close to 0.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first third of the series (roughly indices 0–8), values start moderately high (around 0.2–0.3) and show a clear dip to near 0 before rising again.  
R2: From the middle to around index 16, the series rises steadily to a high peak (around 0.8–1.0).  
R3: After this peak, the series decreases but stays relatively high (mostly above 0.4) until close to the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first third of the series (roughly indices 0–8), values stay very low and flat, close to 0.  
R2: Around indices 8–12, the series shows a sharp, almost linear rise from near 0 to a high level (around 0.6–0.8).  
R3: After peaking, the series falls more strongly and sooner than Class 0, dropping back toward low values (below about 0.2) before the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively high value (around 0.2–0.35) and then decreases during the first few time steps.  
R2: The values stay very low (near 0) roughly from time 4 to about time 8–9.  
R3: After this low plateau, there is a single main rise to a peak around time 12–14, followed by a gradual decline.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts at a low value (around 0–0.1) and remains low during the first few time steps.  
R2: Instead of a flat low plateau, the series begins to rise earlier, with a noticeable upward trend already before time 8–9.  
R3: The main peak occurs later than in Class 0 (around time 15–18), and the rise toward this peak is more gradual from the early low values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 4–6 time steps, values start moderately high (around 0.2–0.35) and clearly decrease toward near 0.0.
R2: After a low plateau (around time 6–9), there is a single dominant steep rise to a main peak between time 12–14, reaching at least about 0.7–0.9.
R3: After this main peak, values gradually decrease but remain relatively high (above ~0.4) for several steps before dropping toward near 0.0 at the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 4–6 time steps, values stay low and flat (close to 0.0–0.05) without an initial moderate peak.
R2: From this flat start, there is a delayed rise beginning later (around time 7–10), leading to one or more peaks between time 12–18 that reach about 0.5–0.7.
R3: After the last peak, values fall more sharply and more monotonically toward near 0.0, without a long high plateau.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value and clearly decreases during the first third of the time, reaching a low around 0.0–0.1.  
R2: After this early minimum, the series rises steeply to a single broad peak in the middle third, with values around 0.6–1.0.  
R3: In the last third, the series declines from that middle peak but remains at mid-range values (roughly 0.2–0.6) rather than dropping back near zero.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts very close to zero and stays near-zero and flat for the entire first third of the time.  
R2: After this flat near-zero segment, the series rises sharply to reach its main peak in the middle/late part, with values around 0.6–0.8 or higher.  
R3: In the last third, the series decreases from that peak down toward low values again (roughly 0.1–0.3).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first quarter of the series (early time steps), the values start at a moderate level (> 0.2) and then dip close to zero before rising again.  
R2: The main rise begins around the middle of the series and reaches a peak value close to or above 0.8.  
R3: After the peak, the values stay relatively high (mostly above 0.5) until late in the series, and only then drop.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first quarter of the series, the values stay very low (near zero, typically < 0.1) with little variation.  
R2: The main rise begins slightly later (around the middle), but the peak value stays below about 0.8.  
R3: After the peak, the values fall steadily and end at a low level (below about 0.3).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a relatively high value (around 0.2–0.35) and decreases to a small value (≈0–0.05) within the first 6–8 time steps.  
R2: There is a single dominant increasing ramp beginning around time 8–10 that rises steeply to a peak above 0.8.  
R3: After this peak, the series stays relatively high (mostly above 0.5) until roughly time 18, then gradually decreases toward lower values (below 0.4) by the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts near zero (below about 0.1) and stays very low and flat during the first 5–7 time steps.  
R2: A pronounced rising segment begins around time 7–9 and reaches a first peak around time 12–14 at a moderate height (around 0.6–0.7).  
R3: After this first peak, there is a noticeable dip followed by a second peak of similar or slightly higher height around time 16–18, after which the series falls sharply toward low values by the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first third of the series, values start from a moderate level (around 0.2–0.3) and clearly decrease toward near-zero.
R2: In the middle third, there is a single sharp rise from near-zero up to a high peak around 0.5–0.7.
R3: After the middle peak, the values decline smoothly toward the end, remaining above zero but clearly lower than the peak.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first third of the series, values start very close to zero and stay low and flat (near-zero plateau).
R2: In the middle third, values increase from this low plateau to one or two pronounced peaks around 0.6–0.8.
R3: After the middle peaks, the values decrease toward the end, but from a higher level than they started (end values are noticeably above the initial near-zero plateau).

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: The series starts at a moderate value (around 0.2–0.4) and decreases to a low value (near 0) within the first third of the time.  
R2: After this early dip, the series rises steeply from near 0 to a high plateau (around 0.7–0.9) between the middle and two‑thirds of the time.  
R3: In the last third, the series stays relatively high (often forming a broad high region) and then only gently declines, without a sharp drop back to near 0.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series starts very low (near 0) and stays low during the first third of the time, without an initial moderate peak.  
R2: From the low start, the series rises steeply to a single main peak (around 0.5–0.7) roughly in the middle of the time.  
R3: After this peak, the series declines strongly and almost monotonically toward near 0 in the last third of the time, without maintaining a high plateau.
